title: Kilner Replacement Rubber Seals Pack of 6 Airtight Food-Safe Seals for 0.125L Round Clip Top Jars Durable and Reusable for Preserving, Storage, and Airtight Freshness
features: REPLACEMENT SEALS: Kilner replacement rubber seals are made from high-grade, food-safe, durable rubber perfect for all preserving needs
SIZE: These quality seals will ensure an airtight seal on the kilner round and square clip top jars in our 0.125 litre round clip top jar
SET OF 6: This set contains 6 replacement rubber seals for kilner 0.125 litre round clip top jar
TAKING CARE: This product is hand wash only, please sterilise before preserving any foods
THE KILNER STORY: The original kilner jar, invented by john kilner and co, in england is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago
